Room Paint Calculator

Calculate how much paint you need for a room. Enter room dimensions and the calculator accounts for doors and windows.

FAQ

How much does a gallon of paint cover?

One gallon of paint typically covers 350-400 square feet with one coat on smooth surfaces.

How many coats of paint do I need?

Most jobs need 2 coats. Use 1 coat for touch-ups or same-color repaints. Use 3 coats when covering dark colors with light.

Should I subtract doors and windows?

Yes. A standard door is about 20 sq ft and a window about 15 sq ft. Subtracting these gives a more accurate estimate.
